abilities.description: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 3 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.Upgraded: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 2 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.

translation.ru_description: Потратьте всю ману. Дайте видимому юниту случайный бафф хар-к за каждые 3 потр. маны. Врагам дает дебаффы.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Потратьте всю ману. Дайте видимому юниту случайный бафф хар-к за каждые 2 потр. маны. Врагам дает дебаффы.
translation.en_description: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 3 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Spend all your mana. Give a unit within your line of sight a random stat up for every 2 mana spent (rounded up). Give enemies random stat downs instead.

abilities.description: Upgrade one of your spells at random for the rest of the battle.Upgraded: Target yourself or a unit within your line of sight and upgrade one of their spells at random for the rest of the battle.

translation.ru_description: Улучшите одно из своих заклинаний случайным образом до конца битвы.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Улучшите случайное заклинание себе или видимому юниту до конца битвы.
translation.en_description: Upgrade one of your spells at random for the rest of the battle.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Target yourself or a unit within your line of sight and upgrade one of their spells at random for the rest of the battle.

abilities.description: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals 10 damage and inflicts Stun instead.Upgraded: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals 25 damage and inflicts Stun instead.

translation.ru_description: Испарите всё на выбранной видимой клетке. Боссам наносит урон и Оглушение.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Испарите всё на выбранной видимой клетке. Боссам наносит массивный урон и Оглушение.
translation.en_description: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals 10 damage and inflicts Stun instead.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Vaporize everything on a tile within your line of sight. Against a boss, this deals 25 damage and inflicts Stun instead.

abilities.description: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit near you in your line of sight.Upgraded: Inflict Blind 2 on each enemy within five tiles of you in your line of sight.

translation.ru_description: Наложите Слепоту 2 на каждого видимого юнита рядом.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Слепоту 2 на каждого видимого врага в радиусе 5.
translation.en_description: Inflict Blind 2 on each unit near you in your line of sight.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Blind 2 on each enemy within five tiles of you in your line of sight.

abilities.description: Swap positions with a random unit.Upgraded: Swap positions with a random unit. If that unit was an enemy, you inflict Confusion on it.

translation.ru_description: Поменяйтесь местами со случайным юнитом.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Поменяйтесь местами со случайным юнитом. Если это враг — Замешательство.
translation.en_description: Swap positions with a random unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Swap positions with a random unit. If that unit was an enemy, you inflict Confusion on it.

abilities.description: Take an extra turn. You're stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn. (This spell can't be cast on extra turns.) Upgraded: Take an extra turn. You have a 75% chance to be stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn. (This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)

translation.ru_description:
Сделайте доп. ход. В этот ход вы оглушены и не регените ману.
[s:.7](Нельзя применять в доп. ходы.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Сделайте доп. ход. 75% шанс оглушения и отсутствия регена маны.
[s:.7](Нельзя применять в доп. ходы.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Take an extra turn. You're stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Take an extra turn. You have a 75% chance to be stunned and don't regenerate mana on that turn.
[s:.7](This spell can't be cast on extra turns.)[/s]

abilities.description: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. You go first next round.Upgraded: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. Those units get +4 temporary Speed. You go first next round.

translation.ru_description: Все союзники, кто еще не ходил, ходят сразу после вас. Вы ходите первым в след. раунде.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Все союзники, кто еще не ходил, ходят сразу после вас. Они получают +4 врем. [img:spd].
translation.en_description: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. You go first next round.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Every ally that hasn't taken their turn yet takes their turn right after yours. Those units get +4 temporary [img:spd]. You go first next round.

abilities.description: Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.Upgraded: Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Телепорт на любую клетку. В конце хода вы вернетесь на исходную и нанесете 10 урона, если в кого-то влетите.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Телепорт на любую клетку. В конце хода вы вернетесь на исходную и нанесете 10 урона, если в кого-то влетите.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Teleport to any tile. At the end of your turn, teleport back to your original tile and deal 10 damage to any unit you teleport into.

abilities.description: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into.Upgraded: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into and inflict them with Confusion 2 and Blind 2.

translation.ru_description: Телепорт на 2 клетки. Смещает юнитов, в которых вы влетели.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепорт на 2 клетки. Смещает юнитов и накладывает Замешательство 2 и Слепоту 2.
translation.en_description: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport two tiles away. Displace any units you teleport into and inflict them with Confusion 2 and Blind 2.

abilities.description: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 1 on that unit.Upgraded: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 2 and Magic Weakness 1 on that unit.

translation.ru_description: Разверните видимого юнита на 180 градусов. Замешательство 1.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Разверните видимого юнита на 180 градусов. Замешательство 2 и Маг. Слабость 1.
translation.en_description: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 1 on that unit.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Turn a unit within your line of sight 180 degrees. Inflict Confusion 2 and Magic Weakness 1 on that unit.

abilities.description: A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy.Upgraded: A unit within your line of sight backflips out of the way the next time they're targeted by an enemy. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Видимый юнит сделает Сальто Назад и увернется при следующей атаке на него.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Видимый юнит сделает Сальто Назад и увернется при следующей атаке на него.

translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Madness and Confusion on a unit in your line of sight.

abilities.description: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision.Upgraded: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision and get stunned.

translation.ru_description: 10 Отбрасывания соседям. При полной мане: они получают 10 урона при столкновении.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: 10 Отбрасывания соседям. При полной мане: 10 урона при столкновении и Оглушение.

translation.en_upgraded_description: Deal 10 Knockback to adjacent units. If you cast this from full mana, the units take 10 damage on collision and get stunned.

abilities.description: Pull units toward a tile within range 5.Upgraded: Pull units in a larger area toward a tile at infinite range.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Притяните юнитов в большой области к клетке (бесконечная дальность).

translation.en_upgraded_description: Pull units in a larger area toward a tile at infinite range.

abilities.description: Gain +1 Intelligence and -1 Charisma.

translation.ru_description: Получите +1 [img:int] и -1 [img:cha].
translation.en_description: Gain +1 [img:int] and -1 [img:cha].

abilities.description: Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn.Upgraded: Spawn a friendly illusion of a random unit that fades away after one turn. The illusion gets +4 Speed and +2 Damage.

abilities.description: Push away each unit near you. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.Upgraded: Push away each unit near a target area. This inflicts Madness and has a small chance to inflict Stun.

abilities.description: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 on all units in your line of sight.Upgraded: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 and Confusion 1 on all non-allied units in your line of sight.

translation.ru_upgraded_description: Наложите Магическую Слабость 2 и Замешательство 1 на всех видимых НЕ-союзников.

translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Magic Weakness 2 and Confusion 1 on all non-allied units in your line of sight.

abilities.description: Force a unit within your line of sight to move and attack one of its enemies.Upgraded: Give a unit within your line of sight All Stats Up and force it to move and attack one of its enemies.

translation.ru_description: Заставьте видимого юнита двигаться и атаковать одного из своих врагов.

abilities.description: Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn. Castable only if you haven't taken any actions this turn. (This can't be cast on extra turns.) Upgraded: Give a unit within your line of sight an extra turn immediately, then end your turn. translation.ru_upgraded_description: Перемешайте позиции всех юнитов. Враги получают Замешательство. Шанс 10% стереть обычного врага из реальности.
translation.en_description: Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Randomize the positions of all units. Enemies get Confused. Non-boss enemies have a 10% chance to be erased from existence.

abilities.description: Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects. (This spell can be cast only once per battle.) Upgraded: Revive all bodies, fully heal all units, and clear all status effects. Castable while you're downed. It costs 0 mana if you're downed. (This spell can be cast only once per battle.)
Create floating glass shards on a tile within your line of sight.Upgraded: Create floating glass shards in an area within your line of sight.

translation.ru_description: Создайте парящие осколки стекла на видимой клетке.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Создайте парящие осколки стекла в видимой области.
translation.en_description: Create floating glass shards on a tile within your line of sight.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Create floating glass shards in an area within your line of sight.

abilities.description: Dash up to three tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.Upgraded: Dash up to five tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.

translation.ru_description: Рывок до 3 клеток. Оставляет парящее стекло на пройденных клетках.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Рывок до 5 клеток. Оставляет парящее стекло на пройденных клетках.
translation.en_description: Dash up to three tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Dash up to five tiles in a straight line or diagonally. Leave floating glass shards on tiles you pass through.

abilities.description: Collect any pickup within your line of sight.Upgraded: Collect any pickup within your line of sight. Gain +1 Luck.

translation.ru_description: Соберите любой лут в пределах видимости.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Соберите любой лут в пределах видимости.
Получите +1 [img:lck].
translation.en_description: Collect any pickup within your line of sight.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Collect any pickup within your line of sight.
Gain +1 [img:lck].

abilities.description: Inflict Freeze on a unit within your line of sight.Upgraded: Inflict Freeze 1, Blind 2, and Confusion 2 on a unit within your line of sight.

translation.ru_description: Заморозьте видимого юнита.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Заморозка 1, Слепота 2 и Замешательство 2 на видимого юнита.
translation.en_description: Inflict Freeze on a unit within your line of sight.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Inflict Freeze 1, Blind 2, and Confusion 2 on a unit within your line of sight.

abilities.description: Cause an enemy within your line of sight to attack another enemy if it can.Upgraded: Cause enemies in a target area within your line of sight to each attack another enemy if they can.

translation.ru_description: Заставьте видимого врага атаковать другого врага, если он может.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Заставьте видимых врагов в области атаковать других врагов, если они могут.
translation.en_description: Cause an enemy within your line of sight to attack another enemy if it can.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Cause enemies in a target area within your line of sight to each attack another enemy if they can.

abilities.description: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles.Upgraded: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles with Chain Knockback.

translation.ru_description: Толкните видимого юнита от себя на 10 клеток.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Толкните видимого юнита от себя на 10 клеток с Цепным Отбрасыванием.
translation.en_description: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Push a unit within your line of sight away from you 10 tiles with Chain Knockback.

abilities.description: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn.Upgraded: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn. If its was an ally, the bleed thorns last for the rest of the battle.

translation.ru_description: Дайте юниту в пределах вашей видимости +3 Кровоточащие Шипы временно до конца его хода.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Дайте юниту в пределах вашей видимости +3 Кровоточащие Шипы временно до конца его хода. Если это союзник, Кровоточащие Шипы действуют до конца боя.
translation.en_description: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Give a unit within your line of sight +3 temporary Bleed Thorns until the end of its turn. If its was an ally, the bleed thorns last for the rest of the battle.

abilities.description: Restore all of your mana and fall asleep. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Restore all of your mana and fall asleep. (Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)

translation.ru_description:
Восстановите всю ману и усните.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Восстановите всю ману и усните.
[s:.7](Раз за ход. Бесплатно.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Restore all of your mana and fall asleep.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn. This spell costs 0 mana.)[/s]

abilities.description: Teleport all enemies within an area as close to the center of that area as possible.Upgraded: Teleport all enemies within a large area as close to the center of that area as possible and inflict Confusion on those units.

translation.ru_description: Телепортируйте всех врагов в области как можно ближе к её центру.
translation.ru_upgraded_description: Телепортируйте всех врагов в большой области к центру и наложите Замешательство.
translation.en_description: Teleport all enemies within an area as close to the center of that area as possible.
translation.en_upgraded_description: Teleport all enemies within a large area as close to the center of that area as possible and inflict Confusion on those units.

abilities.description: Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.Upgraded: Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you. (This spell costs less.)

translation.ru_description: Притяните любого видимого юнита на клетку рядом с собой.
translation.ru_upgraded_description:
Притяните любого видимого юнита на клетку рядом с собой.
[s:.7](Это заклинание стоит дешевле.)[/s]
translation.en_description: Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Pull any unit within your line of sight to a tile adjacent to you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]
